title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering is the practice of building wrapper systems around LLMs to create reliable coding agents. It operates at two levels: the AI layer governing single sessions through rules and hooks, and multi-session orchestration that chains focused agents into larger workflows. The harness comprises roughly 98% of production systems like Claude Code.
